ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bajaj Auto Limited has announced that all key business functions, including manufacturing, sales, and service, are operating normally following a ransomware attack reported on June 23, 2026, impacting the company and its subsidiary. While this indicates a swift operational recovery and limited immediate material impact on business continuity, the ongoing investigation into the cyber security incident suggests potential unquantified risks related to the full extent of the breach or future vulnerabilities.
